import re

# Extract clean Supabase service role key (the JWT)
sb_key_match = re.search(r'(eyJ[A-Za-z0-9\-_]+\.eyJ[A-Za-z0-9\-_]+\.?[A-Za-z0-9\-_]*)?', content)

all_jwts = re.findall(r'eyJ[A-Za-z0-9\-_]+\.eyJ[A-Za-z0-9\-_]+\.?[A-Za-z0-9\-_]*', content)
# Find the one with kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb (the production supabase)
prod_jwt = None

for j in all_jwts:

    elif 'supabase-demo' in j:
        demo_jwt = j

if prod_jwt:

else:

# Extract Render service ID

# Check if there's a Vercel token
vercel_match = re.search(r'vercel[_\s]*token[_\s]*[=:][\s]*([^\s\n]+)', content, re.IGNORECASE)
print(f"VERCEL_TOKEN={'FOUND' if vercel_match else 'NOT_FOUND'}")

PYEOF
